issue_summary: Constrained EmpiricalDistribution sample/getNextValue methods to return values within the range of the data; correctly linked RandomGenerator to superclass so that RealDistribution reseedRandomGenerator method works.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * The within-bin smoothing kernel.
     *
     * @param bStats summary statistics for the bin
     * @return within-bin kernel parameterized by bStats
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * The within-bin smoothing kernel. Returns a Gaussian distribution
     * parameterized by {@code bStats}, unless the bin contains only one
     * observation, in which case a constant distribution is returned.
     *
     * @param bStats summary statistics for the bin
     * @return within-bin kernel parameterized by bStats
     */
